title: Napoleon Weaponry
description: The perfect mod for fans of the Napoleonic era and vanilla-style flintlock weapons and cannons.
body:
![Napoleons Weaponry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/156e24ebfb4b0170a151e260bf9e7b1ac7e0f94f.png)
> _"God fights on the side with the best artillery." — Napoleon Bonaparte_
> 
Looking to immerse yourself in the Napoleonic Wars? You've come to the right place! Napoleon's Weaponry replaces the boring vanilla combat with authentic flintlock firearms, cannons and sabers from the French Empire and beyond.

# **Features**

**Vanilla-faithful** 32x textures that blend seamlessly with the base game,
perfect for historical role-play and survival.
![Guy shooting from musket with bayonet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9ad0fffd19255dfba88c0245b73ecf8bb73072.png)

**Realistic shooting mechanics** that require extraordinary skills.
![Guy scoping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/140d038a52450126988d2e12943e60b5b9f031e4.jpeg)

**Dynamic Environment Interaction:** Bullets don't just stop—they react.
Glass shatters, pots break, and TNT ignites upon impact. Soft cover like
leaves can be penetrated, though the bullet will lose speed and damage.


**Realistic water physics:** Projectiles encounter resistance in water,
drastically reducing their speed and damage upon entry.
![bullet travelling cross the water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/209dbfffca702457356bd38986fc0c77239eaa9b.jpeg)

**Each weapon** model has detailed lock mechanism.
![guy holding the blunderbuss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f4130b14ac22ff99554bc7d288676947a313433.jpeg)

**Detailed cannons**(for now only 1) with realistic mechanics.
![cannon standing on the ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a02ce59649934d8f25034f6ee1029a2851012ff0.jpeg)

# **Crafting**
I highly recommend using JEI (Just Enough Items) to view all the recipes, but here are a few of the most basic ones:
 

**Charleville 1777**

![musket crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0da11ba1c2c88db68792a034ffed3ed244b58231.png)

_The workhorse of Napoleon's army_

Durability: 250

**Paper Cartridge (.69 Caliber)**

![paper cartridge recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6fb72e8f5b51240ba40c0f34bb35631f5603686.png)

_A standard cartridge is a bullet wrapped in paper with a pinch of gunpowder._

**Musket Ball**
# 
![musket ball recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/167b50f24e8229627ee407e269dd1618543c4b35.png)

_Ordinary lead bullet_

# **Controls**
In fact, everything is simple - to load a weapon, you need to have a Paper Cartridge in your inventory (of the desired caliber, of course), and start holding the RMB until the weapon icon lights up white. After that, pressing the RMB again is a shot. For a rifle, it's almost the same, but when you load it, you can aim with the RMB, and shooting is done with the LMB.(you can also shoot without aiming, but the accuracy will be much worse)

# **Update Log:**
Feb 6 - Mod release!

Mar 9 - Added some cool features

May 11 - Cannons update! Added cannon de 8 Gribeauval, and some another cool stuff (features).

May 20-30(soon) - More cannons and more versions support(and maybe fabric support)

# FAQ & Permissions
Q: Can I use this mod in my modpack?
A: Yes, absolutely! You are free to include this mod in any modpack.


Q: Is there a NeoForge version? 
A: No, this mod is only for Forge/Fabric, but I will try to add a NeoForge version soon.
 

Q: Will you backport to older versions (1.12.2, 1.16.5)? 
A: No, I focus on the modern versions of Minecraft.


 _If you have more questions or any suggestions for the mod, write in the comments, I'll read everything._

# Some information
This is actually my first ever Minecraft mod, so there may be minor bugs, but I will fix them.
